login.title: Login to your account
login.description: Enter your email below to login to your account

email.mustBeDifferent: The new email must be different from the current one.

phoneNumber.alreadyInUse: Phone number is already in use

post.contentRequired: The post content cannot be empty.
post.contentMax: The post content cannot exceed 2000 characters.

password.min: Password must be at least 6 characters
password.weak: Password is too weak, please choose a stronger password

file.onlyPng: Only PNG, JPEG, and JPG files are allowed
file.min: At least one file is required
file.max: No more than 2 files are allowed
file.atLeast: You must provide at least one accreditation file

verification.resentMessage: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
verification.successMessage: Your email has been successfully verified. You can now proceed.

messages.default: Something went wrong. Please try again.
messages.auth/user-not-found: No user found with this email address.
messages.auth/network-request-failed: Check your internet connection and try again.
messages.auth/too-many-requests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

auth/email-not-verified.title: Email Not Verified
auth/email-not-verified.message: You must verify your email address before logging in. Please check your inbox for the verification link.

success.title: Reset Link Sent
success.message: If an account exists with this email, a reset link has been sent.

info.title: Sign-in Required
info.message: This email is linked to an account created without a password. Please sign in using your original sign-in method.

error.title: Reset Link Failed
error.message: Unable to send reset link. Please try again.

success.title: Registration Successful
success.message: Your account has been created successfully!

googleAccount.title: Google Account Linked
googleAccount.message: Your Google account has been linked successfully, please complete your profile to continue.

error.title: Registration Failed
error.message: There was an error creating your account. Please try again.
error.uploadFailed: Échec du téléversement d'un fichier. Veuillez vérifier votre connexion

profileUpdated.title: Profile Updated
profileUpdated.message: Your profile has been successfully updated.

emailUpdated.title: Email Updated
emailUpdated.message: Your email has been updated. A new verification link has been sent.
emailUpdated.pendingVerificationMessage: A verification link has been sent to {newEmail}. Please check your inbox to finalize the email change.

register.title: Create Your Account
register.step1Description: Choose your account type and set up your login details.
register.individualDescription: For healthcare professionals, researchers, students, etc.
register.legalEntityDescription: For companies, hospitals, associations, clinics, research institutions and others healthcare entities.
register.step3Description: Add optional information for your profile and address.
register.verifyEmailMessage: We've sent a verification link to {email}. Please check your inbox to continue.
register.verifyEmailSpam: Can't find the email? Check your spam folder.

confirmUpdate.title: Confirm Update
confirmUpdate.messageProfile: Are you sure you want to change your profile picture?
confirmUpdate.messageCover: Are you sure you want to change your cover photo?

updateProfile.title: Edit Profile
updateProfile.description: Update your information. Click "Save" when you're done.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

changeEmail.title: Change your email address
changeEmail.description: Enter your new email and current password.
